_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing large data sets
reference_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing and optimizing SQL query execution plans, identifying performance bottlenecks, and implementing indexing, partitioning, and query restructuring strategies to improve data retrieval performance.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Skill TF-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.462), DA-S-006 (DA, cosine: 0.439).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.547). Shared vocabulary: [analyzing, data, skill]. NICE-only terms [large, sets] vs WIDAI-only terms [bottlenecks, execution, identifying, implementing, improve, indexing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.914, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.062 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:76.1%, C:23.8%). No dominant classification for "Skill in analyzing large data sets" vs "Skill in analyzing and optimizing SQL query execution plans, identifying perform" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.464 < STS 0.547 (gap -0.083). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [large, sets] and [bottlenecks, execution, identifying] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.4%. Shared tokens: [analyzing, data, skill]. NICE-only: [large, sets]. WIDAI-only: [bottlenecks, execution, identifying, implementing, improve, indexing].
